acceptance.family: two candidate-family assemblies byte-identical with complete release index and SHA256SUMS
acceptance.projection: successor install_only is an exact projection of accepted full r5 python/install
acceptance.runtime: all Android qualification checks true for install_only and stripped
acceptance.sdk: direct and managed baseline native-extension build/install/import and 16 KiB alignment pass
acceptance.stripping: only the existing accepted bounded stripping mutation is allowed

forbidden: modify the accepted full r5 bytes
rewrite any predecessor artifact or frozen authority
supersede the predecessor family before successor-family acceptance
start legal integration or RB-1/RB-2 rebinding inside the technical derivation transaction
claim raw user-built wheel portability or run repair tooling
claim RB-3 closure, selectability, or publication

install_only.role: exact python/install projection of accepted full r5

install_only_stripped.role: bounded deterministic stripped derivation from successor install_only

required_execution: acquire and verify the exact accepted full r5 from the r4 owner result archive
derive install_only twice as an exact python/install projection and prove byte identity
derive install_only_stripped twice using the existing bounded stripping policy and prove byte identity
verify full remains byte exact and all three candidate artifacts have complete manifests and sidecars
qualify fresh extraction, relocation, subprocess, venv, imports, python-config, pkg-config, and uv system/managed consumer paths for install_only and stripped
build, install, and import the baseline native extension against install_only and stripped and require 16 KiB LOAD alignment
record user-built wheel DT_NEEDED/RPATH/RUNPATH only as diagnostics and perform no repair
assemble a deterministic candidate technical family twice and independently audit identities and predecessor invariance
